name: Innovatrics
description: Innovatrics provides biometric SDKs and APIs for face, fingerprint and iris recognition used in identity verification, border control, AFIS and civil ID programs across many countries.

seo.title: Innovatrics — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Innovatrics: Innovatrics provides biometric SDKs and APIs for face, fingerprint and iris recognition used in identity verification, border control, AFIS and civ

when_to_use: Face recognition SDK for civil ID and border control systems
Fingerprint biometric matching for AFIS integration
Iris recognition API for high-security facility access
1:N biometric deduplication for national ID programs
Passive liveness SDK integration for remote KYC flows

pros: Mature face, fingerprint and iris SDKs
Used in civil ID and border control programs
cons: SDK vendor, not a turnkey onboarding platform
review.verdict: Heavy-duty biometric SDKs for governments and platforms, not a quick KYC solution for fintech.
review.best_for: Government ID programs, AFIS deployments and IDV vendors embedding biometrics into products
review.not_for: Fintech teams wanting a ready-made KYC API with document capture and screening bundled

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
